devdoc.details: Registry for companies participating in the payroll system Handles company registration, KYC verification, and status management

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

changeCompanyStatus(address,uint8).details: Change company status (only owner or KYC verifier)

getTotalCompanies().details: Get total number of registered companies

isCompany(address).details: Check if an address is a registered company

isVerifiedCompany(address).details: Check if a company is verified (active status)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

updateTotalPaid(address,uint256).details: Update total paid amount for a company (called by PayrollContract)

updateWorkerCount(address,uint256).details: Update worker count for a company (called by PayrollContract)

params._companyAddress: Address of the company to verify

devdoc.title: CompanyRegistry
